mutations.description: Accept a clock that cannot produce the required 1 MHz timer tick.
Accept a clock divider that exceeds the eight-bit prescaler.
Program the requested tick count instead of the zero-based reload value.
Enable the timer before clearing a stale pending interrupt.
Configure periodic counting without enabling its interrupt.
Write the wrong bit to the write-one-to-clear register.
Access MMIO before returning false for a null configuration pointer.
Consume a pending interrupt while answering the read-only query.
